headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.gstatic.com https://browser.sentry-cdn.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com https://lh3.googleusercontent.com https://storage.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com https://*.sentry.io; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
